description: A global command palette triggered by CMD+K (or Ctrl+K) that provides instant search across items (by name, SKU, or barcode), navigation to any page, and quick actions (new item, new movement, new PO, etc.). The palette uses a fuzzy search algorithm and groups results by category (Items, Pages, Actions). Keyboard shortcuts are registered for common operations throughout the app. The CMD+K trigger button is visible in the persistent header (PRD-01).

stories.title: Command palette dialog
stories.description: Create src/components/command/CommandPalette.tsx — a dialog using the shadcn Command component. Triggered by CMD+K / Ctrl+K globally or clicking the search trigger in the header. Shows a search input with placeholder 'Search items, pages, actions…'. Results grouped into sections: Items, Pages, Actions. Each result has an icon, label, and optional description. Arrow keys navigate, Enter selects, ESC closes. Renders as a centered overlay with backdrop blur.
acceptanceCriteria: CMD+K and Ctrl+K open the palette
Responsive: full-width on mobile with padding

verification.test: Enter demo mode. Press CMD+K — palette opens. Type text — results appear. Arrow down — highlight moves. Press Enter — action taken. Press ESC — closes. Click header search — opens. No console errors.

stories.notes: CommandPalette using shadcn Command/CommandDialog. CMD+K and Ctrl+K open. Header search click opens. Pages/Actions sections. Arrow nav + Enter select. ESC closes. Backdrop blur overlay.

stories.title: Item search in command palette
stories.description: Add item search to CommandPalette. Searches across item name, SKU, and barcode fields using case-insensitive substring matching. Results show: item name, SKU (muted), quantity badge, status dot. Max 8 item results. Selecting an item navigates to /app/catalog?item=ID (opens item detail). Debounce search by 200ms. Shows 'No items found' when search has no matches.
acceptanceCriteria: Searches item name, SKU, and barcode
Results show name, SKU, qty, status
Selecting navigates to catalog with item detail open
Items section hidden when no query

verification.test: Enter demo mode. Open CMD+K. Type an item name — matching items appear with SKU and qty. Select one — navigates to catalog with item detail open. Type a SKU — matches by SKU. Type gibberish — 'No items found'. No console errors.

stories.notes: Disabled cmdk built-in filter, manual filtering by name/SKU/barcode. Status dots (green/amber/red). Max 8 results. No results message. Items section hidden when no query. Refactored into palette-pages, palette-actions, ItemResultRow.

stories.title: Page navigation in command palette
stories.description: Add a 'Pages' section to CommandPalette showing all navigable pages. Static list: Dashboard, Catalog, Movements, Suppliers, Purchase Orders, Requests, Locations, Settings. Each with appropriate icon (from lucide-react). Always visible (no search needed), filtered when user types. Selecting a page navigates to it and closes palette. Role-filtered: only show pages the user can access.
acceptanceCriteria: Pages section with all app pages
Each page has icon and label
Correct route paths for each page

verification.test: Enter demo mode. Open CMD+K — Pages section shows all pages with icons. Select 'Suppliers' — navigates to /app/suppliers. Open again, type 'dash' — filters to Dashboard. No console errors.

stories.notes: Pages filtered by role via canAccessRoute. Filtered when typing. Selection navigates and closes. Icons from lucide-react.

stories.title: Quick actions in command palette
stories.description: Add an 'Actions' section to CommandPalette. Actions: New Item (opens item form), New Movement (opens movement form), New Purchase Order (opens PO form), New Request (opens request form), New Supplier (opens supplier form), Export Items CSV (triggers export). Each action has icon and keyboard shortcut hint. Role-filtered: only show actions the user can perform. Actions execute and close the palette.
acceptanceCriteria: Each action has icon and shortcut hint

verification.test: Enter demo mode. Open CMD+K — Actions section visible. Select 'New Item' — navigates to catalog and opens item form. Open again — 'New Movement' works. Switch to requestor — admin actions hidden. No console errors.

stories.notes: Actions section with icons, shortcut hints (N I, N M, N P). Role-filtered by permissions. Filtered when typing. Selection executes action and closes palette.

stories.title: Global keyboard shortcuts
stories.description: Create src/hooks/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts — registers global keyboard shortcuts. Shortcuts: N then I = new item, N then M = new movement, N then P = new PO, N then R = new request, G then D = go to dashboard, G then C = go to catalog, G then M = go to movements, G then S = go to suppliers. Uses a two-key sequence detector with 500ms timeout. Shortcuts disabled when focus is in an input/textarea. Register in the app shell. Show shortcut hints in a help dialog opened by pressing '?'.

verification.test: Enter demo mode on dashboard. Press G then D — stays on dashboard. Press G then C — navigates to catalog. Press '?' — help dialog shows all shortcuts. Click into search input, press G then C — no navigation (disabled in inputs). No console errors.

stories.notes: useKeyboardShortcuts hook with two-key sequences (G+D, G+C, N+I, etc.), 500ms timeout, disabled in inputs. ShortcutsHelpDialog opened by ?. Registered in app shell.
